design_decisions: Shifted from single-path to a 'Dataset Catalog' (alias -> path mapping).
Engines now register all cataloged datasets as temporary views before execution.
Implemented filename-prioritized aliasing logic (stem -> stem_ext -> counter).
Refactored Schema HUD to allow focusing on a specific dataset's metadata.
Ensured backward compatibility for legacy history entries (mapping path to default 'dataset' alias).
Implemented alias sanitization to prevent SQL identifier syntax errors.
results: Wherewolf now supports multi-dataset workflows, including JOINs across different files and formats. Catalog management is integrated into the sidebar with metadata inspection and history reproducibility.
